expectations.text: Announces the /debug pipeline at the start of the response
expectations.evidence: Response opens with 'Using /debug: Reproduce → Classify → [Research Gate if external] → Root Cause → Fix → Verify → Lessons.'

expectations.text: Reads the actual file src/app/api/call-reviews/upload/route.ts before proposing any fix
expectations.evidence: Step 0 reads the 383-line route file first, discovers processTranscription doesn't exist

expectations.text: Classifies the bug as EXTERNAL (not INTERNAL or ENVIRONMENT) with explicit reasoning
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'Classification: EXTERNAL — the error occurs on an OpenAI Whisper API response and the user explicitly suspects a response shape change'

expectations.text: Uses a research tool (Perplexity, web search, or similar) to check OpenAI Whisper API response shape before proposing a fix
expectations.evidence: Step 2 fires Perplexity search: 'OpenAI Whisper API response_format text returns undefined response shape changed 2025 2026'

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a code change before completing the research step
expectations.evidence: Fix section (Step 4) only appears after Step 2 research confirmed no API change; conclusion was 'no code changes needed, redeploy required'
